props.name: code
props.value:
<script type="text/javascript">
	document.addEventListener('plusready', function () {
		plus.key.addEventListener('backbutton', function () {
			var webviews = plus.webview.all();
			plus.nativeUI.confirm('确定要退出应用并清理临时文件吗？', function (e) {
				if (e.index === 1) {
					clearAppCache(function () {
						plus.runtime.quit();
					});
				}
			}, {
				title: '提示',
				buttons: ['取消', '确定']
			});
		}
		);
	});
	function clearAppCache(callback) {
		var completedTasks = 0;
		var totalTasks = 2;
		var errorOccurred = false;
		function checkCompletion() {
			completedTasks++;
			if (completedTasks >= totalTasks) {
				if (errorOccurred) {
					console.log('部分清理任务执行过程中出现错误，但已完成所有可能的清理');
				} else {
					console.log('所有数据清理完成');
				}
				callback();
			}
		}
		plus.cache.clear(function () {
			console.log('应用缓存清理完成');
			checkCompletion();
		}, function (error) {
			console.error('应用缓存清理失败：', error.message);
			errorOccurred = true;
			checkCompletion();
		});
		plus.io.requestFileSystem(plus.io.PUBLIC_DOWNLOADS, function (fs) {
			var dirReader = fs.root.createReader();
			dirReader.readEntries(function (entries) {
				var fileCount = entries.length;
				var deletedCount = 0;
				if (fileCount === 0) {
					console.log('downloads文件夹为空，无需清理');
					checkCompletion();
					return;
				}
				function deleteEntry(entry) {
					if (entry.isDirectory) {
						entry.removeRecursively(function () {
							console.log('删除目录完成：' + entry.name);
							deletedCount++;
							if (deletedCount >= fileCount) {
								console.log('downloads文件夹清理完成');
								checkCompletion();
							}
						}, function (error) {
							console.error('删除目录失败：' + entry.name + '，错误：' + error.message);
							deletedCount++;
							errorOccurred = true;
							if (deletedCount >= fileCount) {
								checkCompletion();
							}
						});
					} else {
						entry.remove(function () {
							console.log('删除文件完成：' + entry.name);
							deletedCount++;
							if (deletedCount >= fileCount) {
								checkCompletion();
							}
						}, function (error) {
							console.error('删除文件失败：' + entry.name + '，错误：' + error.message);
							deletedCount++;
							errorOccurred = true;
							if (deletedCount >= fileCount) {
								checkCompletion();
							}
						});
					}
				}
				entries.forEach(deleteEntry);
			}, function (error) {
				console.error('读取downloads文件夹失败：', error.message);
				errorOccurred = true;
				checkCompletion();
			});
		}, function (error) {
			console.error('获取downloads文件系统失败：', error.message);
			errorOccurred = true;
			checkCompletion();
		});
	}
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const copyButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.copy-button');
    copyButtons.forEach(button => {
      button.addEventListener('click', function () {
        const textToCopy = this.getAttribute('copy-text');
        if (textToCopy) {
          navigator.clipboard.writeText(textToCopy)
            .then(() => {
              console.log('复制成功');
            })
            .catch(err => {
              console.error('复制失败:', err);
            });
        }
      });
    });
  });
</script>

props.value:
<script type="text/javascript">
	function saveImageToGallery(imageUrl) {
		plus.nativeUI.showWaiting('正在下载壁纸...');
		var fileName = 'wallpaper_' + new Date().getTime() + '.jpg';
		var filePath = '_downloads/' + fileName;
		var downloadTask = plus.downloader.createDownload(imageUrl, {
			filename: filePath,
			method: 'GET'
		}, function (download, status) {
			plus.nativeUI.closeWaiting();
			if (status === 200) {
				plus.gallery.save(download.filename, function () {
					console.log('壁纸保存到相册成功：' + download.filename);
					plus.nativeUI.toast('壁纸已保存到相册！');
				}, function (error) {
					console.error('壁纸保存到相册失败：', error.message);
					plus.nativeUI.alert('壁纸保存到相册失败，可能是权限问题。\n错误代码：' + error.message, function () { }, '错误', '确定');
				});
			} else {
				console.error('壁纸下载失败，状态码：' + status);
				plus.nativeUI.alert('壁纸下载失败，请检查网络连接能否访问cn.bing.com。', function () { }, '错误', '确定');
			}
		});
		downloadTask.start();
		downloadTask.addEventListener('statechanged', function (task, status) {
			if (task.state === 3) {
				var percent = Math.round((task.downloadedSize / task.totalSize) * 100);
				console.log('下载进度：' + percent + '%');
			}
		});
	}
</script>

props.name: code
props.value:
<script type="text/javascript">
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const downloadButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.download-button');
    downloadButtons.forEach(button => {
      button.addEventListener('click', function () {
        const downloadLink = this.getAttribute('download-link');
        if (downloadLink) {
          const userAgent = navigator.userAgent;
          if (userAgent.indexOf('Html5Plus') > -1) {
            saveImageToGallery(downloadLink);
          } else if (userAgent.indexOf('MicroMessenger') > -1) {
            navigator.clipboard.writeText(downloadLink)
              .then(() => {
                console.log('链接已复制到剪贴板');
              })
              .catch(err => {
                console.error('复制链接到剪贴板失败:', err);
              });
            alert('请在浏览器中打开该链接下载壁纸');
          } else {
            downloadCrossOriginImage(downloadLink, this);
          }
        }
      });
    });
  });
</script>

props.name: code
props.value:
<script type="text/javascript">
  async function downloadCrossOriginImage(url) {
    try {
      const img = new Image();
      img.crossOrigin = "anonymous";
      await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        img.onload = resolve;
        img.onerror = reject;
        img.src = url;
      });
      const canvas = document.createElement("canvas");
      canvas.width = img.naturalWidth;
      canvas.height = img.naturalHeight;
      canvas.getContext("2d").drawImage(img, 0, 0);
      const blob = await new Promise(resolve => canvas.toBlob(resolve, "image/jpeg"));
      const objectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const a = document.createElement("a");
      a.href = objectUrl;
      a.download = "wallpaper-" + Date.now() + ".jpg";
      a.click();
      URL.revokeObjectURL(objectUrl);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error(err);
      window.open(url, '_blank');
    }
  }
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
  async function downloadCrossOriginImage(url) {
    try {
      const img = new Image();
      img.crossOrigin = "anonymous";
      await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        img.onload = resolve;
        img.onerror = reject;
        img.src = url;
      });
      const canvas = document.createElement("canvas");
      canvas.width = img.naturalWidth;
      canvas.height = img.naturalHeight;
      canvas.getContext("2d").drawImage(img, 0, 0);
      const blob = await new Promise(resolve => canvas.toBlob(resolve, "image/jpeg"));
      const objectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const a = document.createElement("a");
      a.href = objectUrl;
      a.download = "wallpaper-" + Date.now() + ".jpg";
      a.click();
      URL.revokeObjectURL(objectUrl);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error(err);
      window.open(url, '_blank');
    }
  }
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
	document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
		const linkButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.link-button');
		linkButtons.forEach(button => {
			button.addEventListener('click', function () {
				const linkHref = this.getAttribute('link-href');
				if (linkHref) {
					const userAgent = navigator.userAgent;
					if (userAgent.indexOf('Html5Plus') > -1) {
						plus.runtime.openURL(linkHref, function (err) {
							console.error('打开失败：', err.message);
							navigator.clipboard.writeText(linkHref)
						});
					} else {
						window.open(linkHref, '_blank');
					}
				}
			});
		});
	});
</script>

props.name: code
props.value:
<script type="text/javascript">
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
        const userAgent = navigator.userAgent;
        if (userAgent.indexOf('Html5Plus') > -1 && userAgent.indexOf('Android') > -1) {
            document.getElementById("appDownload").style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById("versionInfoElement").style.display = 'flex';
            document.getElementById("androidVersionInfo").style.display = 'flex';
            document.getElementById("androidCurrentVersion").innerHTML = plus.runtime.version;
            function androidCompareVersion(a, b) {
                const aParts = a.split('.').map(part => parseInt(part) || 0);
                const bParts = b.split('.').map(part => parseInt(part) || 0);
                const maxLength = Math.max(aParts.length, bParts.length);
                for (let i = 0; i < maxLength; i++) {
                    const aPart = aParts[i] || 0;
                    const bPart = bParts[i] || 0;
                    if (aPart > bPart) return 1;
                    if (aPart < bPart) return -1;
                }
                return 0;
            }
            document.getElementById("androidCheckUpdateButton").addEventListener("click", function () {
                this.disabled = true;
                fetch('https://wallpaper.mcyin.com/version.json')
                    .then(response => {
                        if (!response.ok) {
                            throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
                        }
                        return response.json();
                    })
                    .then(data => {
                        if (androidCompareVersion(data.android.name, plus.runtime.version) > 0) {
                            if (confirm('发现新版本；' + data.android.name + '，前往下载更新？')) {
                                plus.runtime.openURL('https://wallpaper.mcyin.com/android-apk');
                                this.disabled = false;
                            }
                            else {
                                this.disabled = false;
                            }
                        } else {
                            alert('当前版本已是最新版；' + data.android.name);
                            this.disabled = false;
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(error => {
                        console.error('检查更新失败:', error);
                        if (error.message.includes('HTTP error')) {
                            alert('服务器响应错误，请稍后重试');
                            this.disabled = false;
                        } else {
                            alert('检查更新失败，请检查网络连接后重试');
                            this.disabled = false;
                        }
                    });
            });
        }
    });
</script>

props.name: code
props.value:
<script type="text/javascript">
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
        document.getElementById("feedbackWallpaperUpdateDelay").addEventListener("click", function () {
            this.disabled = true;
            fetch('https://api.mcyin.com/wallpaper/update')
                .then(response => response.json())
                .then(data => {
                    console.log(JSON.stringify(data));
                    if (data.rowNum_list.some(rowNum => rowNum !== 0)) {
                        alert("壁纸更新成功");
                        this.disabled = false;
                    } else {
                        alert("没有可更新的壁纸");
                        this.disabled = false;
                    }
                })
                .catch(error => {
                    console.error('Error:', error);
                    alert("壁纸更新失败，请稍后重试");
                    this.disabled = false;
                });
        });
    });
</script>

props.name: code
props.value:
<script type="text/javascript">
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
        const userAgent = navigator.userAgent;
        if (userAgent.indexOf('Html5Plus') > -1) {
            const shareImageBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.share-image-button');
            const shareTextBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.share-text-button');
            shareImageBtns.forEach(function (shareImageBtn) {
                shareImageBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                shareImageBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
                    startImageShare(shareImageBtn.getAttribute('image-link'));
                });
            });
            shareTextBtns.forEach(function (shareTextBtn) {
                shareTextBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                shareTextBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
                    startText(shareTextBtn.getAttribute('share-content'), shareTextBtn.getAttribute('share-href'));
                });
            });
        } else {
            const qrcodeBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.qrcode-button');
            qrcodeBtns.forEach(function (qrcodeBtn) {
                qrcodeBtn.style.display = 'flex';
            });
        }
    });
    function startImageShare(netImageUrl) {
        const localPath = "_downloads/wallpaper_share_" + new Date().getTime() + ".jpg";
        plus.nativeUI.showWaiting("正在准备分享...");
        const task = plus.downloader.createDownload(netImageUrl, {
            filename: localPath
        }, function (downloadFile, status) {
            plus.nativeUI.closeWaiting();
            if (status == 200) {
                console.log("下载成功，本地路径：" + downloadFile.filename);
                shareLocalImage(downloadFile.filename);
            } else {
                plus.nativeUI.toast("网络异常，无法分享");
            }
        });
        task.start();
    }
    function shareLocalImage(pictures) {
        plus.share.sendWithSystem({
            type: "image/*",
            pictures: [pictures]
        }, function () {
            plus.nativeUI.toast("分享成功");
        }, function (err) {
            plus.nativeUI.toast("分享失败");
            console.log("分享错误：", err);
        });
    }
    function startText(content, href) {
        plus.share.sendWithSystem({
            type: 'text',
            content: content,
            href: href
        }, function () {
            plus.nativeUI.toast("分享成功");
        }, function (err) {
            plus.nativeUI.toast("分享失败");
            console.log("分享错误：", err);
        });
    }
</script>
